channel.title: OnOptions
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘A good way of dealing with overpopulation’: Epstein files reveal how the rich fuel climate denialism
item.description: The trove of documents released by the Department of Justice (DOJ) in relation to Jeffrey Epstein have revealed just how close the convicted child sex...

item.title: BlackRock offers DeFi trading for the first time, buys Uniswap tokens
item.description: The tie-up, which also relies on the crypto firm Securitize, is the first of its kind between Wall Street and Defi.

item.title: An AI Founder’s Viral 5,000 Word Post Says AI Is Already ‘Bigger Than Covid’ and Is About to Change the World. Here’s What You Need to Know
item.description: ‘If you’re not already using AI, you’re way behind,’ says HyperWrite CEO Matt Shumer. Here’s what to do.

item.title: Jobs report: a surprising 130,000 jobs were added in January, but Labor Department makes major revisions to last year’s numbers
item.description: U.S. employers added a surprisingly strong 130,000 jobs last month, but government revisions cut 2024-2025 U.S. payrolls by hundreds of thousands. The...

item.title: The 4 step approach Google’s AI boss used to return the tech giant to a ‘golden era’ of innovation
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: You don’t need Ring Search Party to find your lost dog. Privacy advocates and pet lovers say try this instead
item.description: There are few things everyone can rally behind as much as finding a lost dog. But what if that mission is actually a workaround for mass surveillance?...

item.title: The FAA Closed El Paso Airspace With No Warning—Then Quickly Backtracked. Here’s What People Are Saying
item.description: Flights are back on, but the internet wants to know what happened.

item.title: Disney Veteran Reveals Key Traits That Landed Jordan D’Amaro the CEO Job
item.description: The 15-year employee knows exactly what kind of leader the new boss is.

item.title: Super Bowl ratings revealed: How the game and Bad Bunny’s halftime show stacked up against last year
item.description: Sunday night’s Super Bowl and Bad Bunny fell short of setting records for most watched U.S. broadcast and halftime show . Seattle’s 29-13 victory over...

item.title: Google Nest Just Revealed It Keeps Video You Thought Was Deleted
item.description: The tragic story of Nancy Guthrie’s abduction reveals a hard truth about the promises made by tech companies about your data.

item.title: Kraft Heinz announces it’s pausing plans to split into 2 companies. Here’s why
item.description: Kraft Heinz said Wednesday it’s pausing its plans to split into two companies . Steve Cahillane, a former Kellogg Co. chief who became CEO of Kraft He...

item.title: When Hiring Managers Ghost Recruiters, It’s a Leadership Problem
item.description: Blaming talent acquisition doesn’t accelerate hiring, leadership does. Setting the tone starts at the top.

item.title: ‘The fiscal trajectory is not sustainable’: CBO warns about the highest debt in U.S. history as Trump adds $1.4 trillion to 10-year deficit
item.description: The national debt is set to surpass the historical high of 106% of GDP that it reached in 1946 by 2030, according to the CBO.

item.title: Crypto crime-fighting startup TRM Labs notches $1 billion valuation with new $70 million funding round
item.description: With its blockchain analytics tools, TRM Labs helps private companies and agencies like the FBI track illicit finance.

item.title: Bitcoin demand in Nancy Guthrie disappearance shows how crypto is becoming a more frequent feature of physical crimes
item.description: TMZ and an Arizona news outlet reported receiving the ransom letter.
